uplink.description: fPort 10 status: leak detected, remote flag clear
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (leak=1->water.leak true; battery=95->batteryPercent; temperature=0*255+21=21->water.temperature.current; remote flag clear).

uplink.description: fPort 10 status: no leak, remote flag clear
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (leak=0->water.leak false; temperature=0*255+18=18).

uplink.description: fPort 10 status: leak detected, remote flag set
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (byte0=3 sets bit0 leak + bit1 remote; temperature=1*255+5=260 confirms the verbatim bytes[2]*0xff+bytes[3] formula).

uplink.description: fPort 16 heartbeat: battery + temperature, no leak channel
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (fPort 16 carries no leak/remote; battery=90->batteryPercent; temperature=0*255+22=22).
Synthetic input; reference/upstream-codec.js returns {errors:['unknown FPort']} for any fPort other than 10 or 16.
